description_long: This is a modern, expansive bungalow set on a large, landscaped lot with a circular driveway and multiple garden areas. The structure features a flat roof design, large windows, and several interconnected rectangular volumes, giving it a contemporary architectural style. The property includes a swimming pool, a garage, and a driveway that extends to the street, with manicured lawns and shrubbery surrounding the building. The main entrance is accentuated by a roundabout and is flanked by decorative plants and trees. The exterior is predominantly white with gray accents, and the windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separations between living, recreational, and utility areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a circular driveway on a spacious lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, main entrance, and landscaped garden with a pool visible in the background.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool area, and the interconnected volumes of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, garden, and the extensive use of windows along the building's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, garage, and additional green space with trees and shrubs.
